headline: Lamb Weston Announces Inducement Award Under NYSE Listing Rule 303A.08
summary: EAGLE, Idaho, May 11, 2026--Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) announced today that on May 11, 2026, the company granted 15,096 restricted stock units (the "Inducement Awards") to James D. Gray. The company’s Compensation and Human Capital Committee approved the grant of Inducement Awards, made under the Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. 2026 Inducement Stock Plan, to Mr. Gray as a material inducement to Mr. Gray’s hiring as Chief Financial Officer on April 2, 2026.
